mission.title: Install and Configure Cartography on Kubernetes
mission.description: Cartography is a Python tool that consolidates infrastructure assets and the relationships between them in an intuitive graph view powered by a Neo4j database. It helps security teams understand risk exposure by mapping dependencies across cloud providers, SaaS platforms, and Kubernetes clusters.

steps.title: Deploy Neo4j as a prerequisite
steps.description:
Cartography requires a Neo4j database. Deploy Neo4j using its official Helm chart.
```bash
helm repo add neo4j https://helm.neo4j.com/neo4j
helm repo update
helm install neo4j neo4j/neo4j --namespace cartography --create-namespace --set neo4j.password=changeme
```

steps.title: Install Cartography via pip
steps.description:
Install the Cartography CLI tool using pip. This is the official installation method.
```bash
pip install cartography
```

steps.title: Run Cartography as a Kubernetes Job
steps.description:
Create a Kubernetes Job that runs Cartography to sync infrastructure data into Neo4j.
```bash
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: cartography-sync
  namespace: cartography
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: cartography
        image: ghcr.io/cartography-cncf/cartography:latest
        command: ["cartography"]
        args:
        - "--neo4j-uri"
        - "bolt://neo4j.cartography.svc.cluster.local:7687"
        - "--neo4j-password-env-var"
        - "NEO4J_PASSWORD"
        env:
        - name: NEO4J_PASSWORD
          value: "changeme"
      restartPolicy: Never
  backoffLimit: 3
EOF
```

steps.title: Verify the deployment
steps.description:
Check that Neo4j is running and the Cartography job completed successfully.
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace cartography
kubectl get jobs --namespace cartography
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation will have Neo4j running in the cartography namespace and the Cartography sync job completed. You can then query Neo4j to explore your infrastructure graph.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add neo4j https://helm.neo4j.com/neo4j
helm repo update
helm install neo4j neo4j/neo4j --namespace cartography --create-namespace --set neo4j.password=changeme

uninstall.title: Remove the Cartography Job
uninstall.description: Delete the Cartography sync job from the cartography namespace.

uninstall.title: Uninstall Neo4j
uninstall.description: Remove the Neo4j Helm release and clean up persistent volumes.

uninstall.title: Delete the namespace
uninstall.description: Remove the cartography namespace and verify all resources are cleaned up.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Cartography
upgrade.description: Update the pip package to the latest version and re-run the sync job with the new container image.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Neo4j
upgrade.description: Update the Neo4j Helm release to a newer chart version.

troubleshooting.title: Cartography job fails to connect to Neo4j
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure the Neo4j service is running and the bolt URI is correct.
```bash
kubectl get svc --namespace cartography
kubectl logs job/cartography-sync --namespace cartography
```

troubleshooting.title: Authentication errors
troubleshooting.description: Verify the Neo4j password matches between the Helm chart values and the Cartography job environment variable.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running version 1.24 or higher, along with Helm, kubectl, and pip installed.
